last_agent_action: Applied the `startup-operator` role/domain overlay to the Codex personal assistant template and daily-driver runtime pack so the line's framing lens now matches its grounded startup-partner behavior.

last_validation_results.summary: Applied the `startup-operator` role/domain overlay to the Codex personal assistant line, updated the template and runtime guidance to explain that the lens is about framing rather than personality, and passed runtime validate/benchmark, template validate/benchmark, and whole-factory validation.
Recorded passing validation readiness evidence for the build-pack contract.
Recorded passing inherited benchmark readiness evidence for the assistant smoke path.

resume_instructions: Read the objective, backlog, and work-state files before editing code.
Inspect `.pack-state/agent-memory/latest-memory.json` first when it exists, then fall back to other `.pack-state/agent-memory/*.json` files.
Inspect the operator-intake, session-distillation, operator-profile, memory-policy, and partnership-policy surfaces before changing assistant behavior.

Inspect show-startup-collaboration, show-business-review, show-communication-calibration, show-preference-calibration, show-relationship-reflection, show-memory-distillation, and the latest human feedback note before choosing the next assistant-behavior slice.
stop_conditions: Stop when the current startup personality and meta-containment tuning is implemented and existing bounded validation surfaces pass.
Stop and escalate if the next action would require changing registry, deployment pointer, or promotion state directly.
